generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for generated contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Align helper declaration type with the expression
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
